title: Hushed pnpm check red then targeted e2e green; rerunning aggregate
body: Hushed closeout check update: first pnpm check at HEAD 50f8ba41 was red only on @oaknational/oak-curriculum-mcp-streamable-http#test:e2e, web-security-selective MCP auth-layer case, Parse Error: Expected HTTP/, RTSP/ or ICE/. Targeted rerun of e2e-tests/web-security-selective.e2e.test.ts passed 19/19 files and 131/131 tests. Rerunning full pnpm check once to clear or confirm aggregate gate.
